heading: This Afternoon
text: Cloudy south; increasing clouds north. Snow developing near the Massachusetts border, with 1 to 2 inches; spreading north to Route 4 mid afternoon, with a trace to an inch; and a chance north to Route 2 late. Highs in the low to mid 30s in the south, and mid to upper 30s north. South winds 5 to 15 mph, gusting to 30 mph in the Champlain Valley.

heading: Tonight
text: Snow mainly from the Adirondacks and Route 2 southward, and possibly some wintry mix far south. Overall snow totals 1 to 3 inches, except a trace to 2 inches far north, and 3 to 7 inches from the central and southern Greens eastward, and in the Berkshires. Lows in the low to mid 20s east of the Greens, mid 20s to around 30 west. Winds from the south 5 to 10 mph, gusting to 20 mph early from the Green Mountains westward, then diminishing.

heading: Wednesday
text: Clearing in the morning, and becoming mostly sunny by afternoon. Highs in the low to mid 40s, with some upper 30s far north, and mid 40s to around 50 in southeastern valleys. Winds variable to southwest at around 5 mph.
